COMMUNITY_CONTENT.TITLE: Community & Content Hub
COMMUNITY_CONTENT.DISCOVER: Discover content, deck tech, and highlights from the Talishar community

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.IS_FREE_A: Yes! Talishar is completely free to play. You can enjoy all features without spending any money. We offer exclusive cosmetics for our supporters and those who want to help fund development.
FAQ.DOWNLOAD_NEEDED_Q: Do I need to download anything?
FAQ.DOWNLOAD_NEEDED_A: No downloads required! Talishar runs directly in your web browser on desktop, tablet, or mobile.
FAQ.PLAY_OFFLINE_A: Talishar is an online platform that requires an internet connection to play. This allows you to compete against real players worldwide in real-time.
FAQ.HOW_SIGNUP_Q: How do I create an account?
FAQ.HOW_SIGNUP_A: Click the 'Sign Up' button on the main page and enter your email and password. Your account is created instantly, and you can start playing right away.
FAQ.IS_OFFICIAL_Q: Is this an official Flesh & Blood platform?
FAQ.IS_OFFICIAL_A: Talishar is an unofficial community-created platform. It's not affiliated with Legend Story Studios.
FAQ.BUG_FEATURE_Q: What if I find a bug or have suggestions?
FAQ.BUG_FEATURE_A: We love feedback, this platform wouldn't be the same without it! You can report issues or suggest features through our Discord server. Players input helps us improve Talishar.
FAQ.WHY_NO_RANKED_Q: Why is there no matchmaking or ranked play?
FAQ.WHY_NO_RANKED_A: Talishar is designed as a no-stakes testing platform for players to experiment with decks and strategies. If you wish to have competitive play, head to organised play and join official flesh and blood tournaments!
FAQ.WHERE_PLAY_Q: Where can I play in person?
FAQ.WHERE_PLAY_A: Check out LSS official event locator to find local tournaments and events.
FAQ.HOW_CONTRIBUTER_Q: How can I become a contributor?
FAQ.HOW_CONTRIBUTER_A: Talishar is an open-source project. Head to our discord #dev-general channel to get involved, and check our GitHub for contribution guidelines.

ABOUT.TITLE: Welcome to Talishar
ABOUT.SUB_HEADER: The Unofficial Online Platform for Flesh & Blood
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: Talishar is the free, browser-based community platform where over 9,000+ players daily compete in real-time games of Flesh & Blood. Bring your deck, face off against players worldwide, and master your heroes.
ABOUT.WHAT_IS_DESCRIPTION: Talishar is a passion project built by the Flesh & Blood community for the community. We created this platform to provide players with a free, accessible, and welcoming space to play and test deck ideas. Whether you're a casual player looking to learn the game before joining a local armory or a competitive player wanting some reps. Talishar is there for the community.
ABOUT.WHO_MAINTAINS_DESCRIPTION: Talishar is maintained by a dedicated team of volunteer developers and community members who are passionate about Flesh & Blood. Our team works entirely on a volunteer basis to keep the platform running, code new card sets, fix bugs, and implement new features. We're supported by the community through optional contributions platform like Metafy. It help cover server costs and fund development.
ABOUT.WANT_TO_CONTRIBUTE: Want to contribute? Talishar is open-source! Join us on <1>Discord</1> or check our <3>Github repository</3> to get involved.
ABOUT.LSS_RELATIONSHIP_TITLE: Our Relationship with Legend Story Studios
ABOUT.LSS_RELATIONSHIP_DESCRIPTION: <0>Talishar is an unofficial platform and independent. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Legend Story Studios (LSS), the creators of Flesh & Blood. Talishar operates as a fan-made platform created to celebrate and support the FAB community.<1>While we strive to maintain rules accuracy, Talishar may not be a completely accurate representation of the official rules. For official rulings and clarifications, we recommend consulting the judge community on the <2>Judge Hub Discord or visiting the <3>official FAB rules and policy center.

FEATURES.INSTANT_DESCRIPTION: No downloads required. Play directly in your browser
FEATURES.MOBILE_DESCRIPTION: Play on your phone, tablet, or computer
FEATURES.FEEDBACK_DESCRIPTION: We value your input to improve the platform
FEATURES.NO_STAKES_DESCRIPTION: Don't stress, play and have fun.
FEATURES.SPICY_DESCRIPTION: Experiment with strategies and refine your builds

COMMUNITY.TITLE: Built By The Community
COMMUNITY.DESCRIPTION: Talishar thrives thanks to collaboration with other talented fan software developers from the FAB community:
COMMUNITY.FABRARY_DESCRIPTION: The most advanced Flesh and Blood card search, deck building, and collection management tool.
COMMUNITY.THE_FAB_CUBE_DESCRIPTION: Easy to use cube builder with comprehensive card database for the Flesh and Blood TCG.
COMMUNITY.FAB_CARD_DATABASE_DESCRIPTION: Open source database with JSON/CSV representations of Flesh and Blood cards.
COMMUNITY.LEGENDARY_STORIES_DESCRIPTION: Fan-curated archive of all official Flesh and Blood lore and world-building.
COMMUNITY.FABLAZING_DATA_DESCRIPTION: Discover the current meta landscape and access detailed hero and deck statistics.
COMMUNITY.FAB_INSIGHTS_DESCRIPTION: Advanced statistical analysis of the meta, hero interactions, and Talishar gameplay data.

VALUES.TITLE: Talishar Values
VALUES.INCLUSIVITY_DESCRIPTION: We welcome players of all skill levels and backgrounds. Everyone deserves a safe place to play and learn.
VALUES.TRANSPARENCY_DESCRIPTION: We communicate openly with our community about updates, features, and decisions that affect the platform.
VALUES.ACCURACY_DESCRIPTION: We continuously work to ensure card mechanics and rules are as accurate as possible to official FAB standards.
VALUES.INNOVATION_DESCRIPTION: We listen to player feedback and regularly implement improvements to enhance the gaming experience.
VALUES.SAFETY_DESCRIPTION: We maintain a respectful, harassment-free environment where all players can enjoy the game safely. Report any kind of abuse to our moderators on Discord.
VALUES.COMMUNITY_DRIVEN_DESCRIPTION: Talishar is built by the community, for the community. We value player input and collaboration to shape the platform's future.

ABOUT.DISCLAIMER: <2><1>Disclaimer:</1> Talishar is an open-source, fan-made platform not associated with LSS. It may not be a completely accurate representation of the Rules as written. If you have questions about interactions or rulings, please contact the judges community on the <3> JudgeHub Discord </3> for clarification.</2><2>Talishar is in no way affiliated with Legend Story Studios.
